---
name: Problems Using Aldous
about: Aldous starts, but isn't working as documented or expected.
title: "[Bug]"
labels: bug
assignees: splinterhq

---

Please be as specific as possible, help us reproduce the problem, include any specimen text (if you can) and provide as many of your computer memory and CPU details as you can, even if you just know the general brand name and model. 

If you feel awkward asking publicly for some reason, email timthepost@protonmail.com with as much background as possible and sincere level of urgency in the title.
